turns.content: What brings you in today?
I’ve been feeling tired all the time, no matter how much I sleep. And I’ve been losing weight without trying.
When did this start?
It started a few months ago... maybe around 6 months now. At first I thought it was just my job wearing me down, but it’s not getting any better.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
It's more of a dull ache in my arms and legs, especially after a long shift. Not sharp or anything, just a heavy, sore feeling.
Have you had any fever or chills?
No, I haven't had any fever or chills. My temperature seems normal when I check it.
What medications are you currently taking?
I take metformin for my diabetes. That's the only medicine I'm on.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
Yes, I have type 2 diabetes. That’s what the metformin is for.
Are you allergic to any medications?
No, I don't have any allergies to medicines that I know of.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
No, I haven't really tried anything. I just keep going to work and hope it passes.
Does anything make it better or worse?
Resting at home helps a little, but the tiredness comes right back. Moving around at work seems to make the muscle aches worse, especially toward the end of the day.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
It's getting harder to keep up at work. I’m a housekeeper, so I’m on my feet all
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
No, I've never smoked and I don't drink.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
I don't think so. No one in my family has had this kind of tiredness or weight loss before.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
No, this is the first time I've felt like this. It's different from anything I've gone through before.
I've explained quite a bit — does that make sense so far?
Yes, I think I understand. I just want to know what's wrong because it's been going on for a while now, and it worries me.
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Physically, I'd say it's not the worst pain, but it's a steady ache that wears me down. Emotionally... I'm pretty worried, maybe a 7 or 8 out of 10. I just don't want it to be something serious.
Do you have any questions for me?
Just... do you think it could be something serious? I want to know what's making me so tired and losing weight.
What do you think might be going on?
I honestly don't know... I was hoping you could tell me. Maybe my diabetes acting up? Or something else? I just feel off, and that's not normal for me.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
I guess that's all I can think of. It's just the tiredness, the weight loss, and the muscle aches that have me worried. Thanks for listening.
